notes: Claude Code is the primary/reference target — most dotai fields map 1:1
Model names use aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku) not full model IDs
Hook events use PascalCase (PreToolUse) unlike other tools (camelCase)
SSE transport is deprecated — warn users to migrate to HTTP
CLAUDE.md files concatenate when multiple rules share the same outputDir
Scoped rules use YAML paths: frontmatter in .claude/rules/
Ignore patterns are lossy — mapped to deny rules on Read/Edit tools
Hook handler supports 4 types: command, prompt, agent, http
settings.json has $schema reference for validation
Hook timeout unit is SECONDS (not ms): defaults 600 command, 30 prompt, 60 agent
Hook matchers are regex strings — Edit|Write, mcp__.*, etc.
hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision JSON output format for command/http hooks
SessionStart/SessionEnd/Notification/PreCompact/ConfigChange all support matchers
Hook scopes expanded: plugin hooks/hooks.json, skill frontmatter, agent frontmatter
MCP scope names changed: local (was project), project (shared .mcp.json), user (was global)
Task tool renamed to Agent in v2.1.63; Task(...) still works as alias
Bundled skills: /simplify /batch /debug /loop /claude-api
Auto memory at ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/ — MEMORY.md loaded (first 200 lines)
@path/to/import syntax in CLAUDE.md files
.claude/CLAUDE.md is a valid alternate location for project instructions
claudeMdExcludes setting to skip specific CLAUDE.md files
User-level rules at ~/.claude/rules/
Plugins are a new feature: skills, agents, MCP servers, hooks bundled together
5-tier settings precedence: managed > command-line args > local project > shared project > user
Sandbox expanded with filesystem object (allowWrite/denyWrite/denyRead) and network object
New settings: autoMemoryEnabled, attribution, apiKeyHelper, availableModels, enabledPlugins, allowedHttpHookUrls, disableAllHooks
MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS default is 25000 tokens
ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH env var for MCP Tool Search (auto mode by default)
Managed MCP via managed-mcp.json in system directories
OAuth 2.0 support for MCP servers with authServerMetadataUrl
